_file_role: Chan public benchmark reference for Fe4S4(SCH3)4 from the Iron-Sulfur-Clusters README.
_comment: This file records the directly published reproducibility energy for the Fe4S4 active-space model from the Chan public Iron-Sulfur-Clusters repository README. The README explicitly states that this energy is approximate and not converged with respect to increasing bond dimension.

published_values.quality_note: Approximate; reported only for reproducibility and not converged with respect to increasing bond dimension.
